steps.title: Move from shared style to variation
steps.content: The text first describes a shared Highwaymen framework: repeated compositional structures and subjects. Then it uses Calvin Brooks's Tangerine Sky to show that individual artists could vary within that framework.

steps.title: Reject invented histories
steps.content: Choice B wrongly says the evidence reinforces a perception of being derivative. Choice C invents historical causes and unconventional themes. Choice D invents collaboration and one member's influence. The structure is shared aesthetic framework followed by individual variation. The answer is A.
